states.name: active
states.description: Current Relationship Revision is effective and visible under policy.
entry_requirements: At least one immutable Relationship Revision exists.

states.name: superseded
states.description: A newer Relationship Revision or replacement Relationship is preferred while history remains.
entry_requirements: Supersession reference and reason are retained.

states.name: tombstoned
states.description: Relationship is logically withdrawn while historical revisions remain retained.
entry_requirements: Tombstone authority and retention are recorded.

required_preconditions: Canonical Relationship identity and first immutable Revision exist.
New Revision or replacement Relationship is retained; endpoints/type are not edited in place.
Tombstone reason and retention are recorded.
